data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Google uses a microservice architecture to scale its services independently.
data.technical_spec: Kubernetes & Borg for container orchestration; API gateways for inter-service communication

data.title: Global Load Balancing
data.description: Efficiently distributes incoming traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Google's proprietary load balancing algorithms; Anycast for DNS

data.title: Distributed Data Storage
data.description: Data is stored across multiple data centers with redundancy for high availability.

data.title: Edge Caching
data.description: Content delivery networks for faster load times.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud CDN; multi-region edge locations

data.title: Elastic Compute
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud VMs; Compute Engine with autoscaler
